violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted being used for other than hand washing.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food boxes noted being stored on floor inside walkin freezer.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors and some shelving noted in need of cleaning.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage was observed in an improper container no lid being used.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceiling areas noted in need of cleaning and repair. Wet-stained ceiling tiles noted in restrooms to be replaced. (also-repair any water leaks above)
CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Green pepper noted stored with raw meat inside walkin cooler. ** Discarded.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener not properly maintained need routine cleaning. One microwave interior needs cleaning. Splash area of mixer needs cleaning. One knive on wall rack noted not clean.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Box of food noted on floor inside walkin freezer. Bag of onions noted on floor.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some metal shelving noted rusting need repair or replaced.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some wall areas in kitchen noted in need of cleaning due to food splash. Floor inside walkin freezer needs cleaning. Lower door threshold to walkin cooler noted in need of repair.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors including door handles noted in need of routine cleaning. Top of dish-machine needs cleaning. Food storage bin exteriors need cleaning. Shelving needs routine cleaning.
